case_title: ANDREA AMBROSI VS. OCEANVIEW VILLAGE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-18-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-18-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF ANDREA AMBROSI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT OCEANVIEW VILLAGE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY MICHAEL GOLLNICK, GENERAL MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMBROSI, ANDREA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT OCEANVIEW VILLAGE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION C/O SEABREEZE MGMT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
